CustomField.formula: IF(Domicile__c = 'Luxembourg',HYPERLINK('https://home.carmignac.com/departments/Legal/Documentation/Registration%20mapping_SICAV.pdf',"Link to RDM_SICAV"), IF(Domicile__c = 'France',HYPERLINK('https://home.carmignac.com/departments/Legal/Documentation/Registration%20mapping_FCP.pdf',"Link to RDM_FCP"), 'Not Available'))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Link to Sharepoint for up-to-date Registration Mapping
CustomField.label: Old_Registration Mapping
